Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Sustained, no opposition filed.
